visual_description: A person in a white shirt stands near a whiteboard holding papers, while others sit at desks under desk lamps in a dimly lit room with blinds. One person is seen in close-up holding a phone to their ear, with a watch visible on their wrist. The seated individuals are mostly viewed from behind or in profile, focused on their work or the phone call.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the beginning.
